examples: Cymbal is a pair of round brass plates.
1if I speak in the tongues of men and of angels, but have not love, I am only a resounding gong or a clanging cymbal.
If I speak in the tongues of men and of angels, but have not "Being present", I am a noisy gong or a clanging cymbal.
Appropriately, Stanier's cymbal is set so high, he's got to stretch skyward for each crash.
On one song, Lee used a can of bug spray to suggest a hissing cymbal sound.
